name: Phillip Schofield: Cast Away
overview: Phillip Schofield is marooned on an uninhabited tropical island off the coast of Madagascar for 10 days, documenting the experience using a variety of cameras. The famous face has to confront the challenges of total isolation, the forces of nature, and the battle within their own mind.

trailers.title: Phillip Schofield Cast Away | New Series | Channel 5
